narrative_seed_by_week.7: Probability basics — likelihood, events, conditional probability / Bayes’ theorem intuition — P(rain | dark clouds) without formula derivation / Why LLMs output a probability distribution, not a single fixed answer / Temperature — low picks the most likely token, high introduces variation / Mean, median, mode — consistency across AI runs / Accuracy, precision, recall — plain English definitions / Confusion matrix — why 95% accuracy can still mean frequent failure

lab_activity_seed_by_week.7: Run the same prompt 10× at temperature 0 and 10× at temperature 1 / Tally unique responses, measure variation, compute accuracy on a 5-question yes/no task / Write a 200-word interpretation — what does this tell you about trusting AI?
